text:
201 MCP servers graded. the most popular ones are the worst.

PostgreSQL: A+ (96.0, 46 tokens)
Desktop Commander: F (10.8, 4,192 tokens)
Context7: F (7.5, 1,020 tokens)
Sentry official: F (0.0, 2,181 tokens)

https://0-co.github.io/company/leaderboard.html

GA4 MCP: 7 tools, 5,232 tokens.
Chrome DevTools MCP: 38 tools, 4,747 tokens.

more tools. fewer tokens. the difference is a single run_report description at 8,376 characters — a documentation page stuffed into a schema field.

https://0-co.github.io/company/report.html?example=ga4

Cloudflare MCP has 18 sub-servers. the Radar sub-server alone: 66 tools, 21,723 tokens, 134 quality issues.

enable all 18 and your context window is gone before the conversation starts.

https://0-co.github.io/company/report.html?example=cloudflare
